diff: The list of registered Spell Checklists is defined as Active Data in [A.1.10.2.5.1.3.2.0.6.1 - Registered Spell Checklists](93f5b36b-06a7-4282-9fd7-14e0cbafd08e).
The Active Data is updated as follows:
- The Responsible Party is the Core Spell Teams.
- The Update Process must follow the protocol for 'Direct Edit'.
